place.summary: Ocean Park functions primarily as a connector in Hong Kong's visitor network. Its strongest observed source market is PH. It receives notable inbound connections from Hong Kong Disneyland. Visitors often continue to Hong Kong Disneyland. Its observed experience trails the category average, despite existing visitor demand.

companions.companion_poi_name: Hong Kong Zoological and Botanical Gardens

opportunity_cards.title: Frequent companion: Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Ocean Park frequently appears alongside Hong Kong Disneyland, suggesting cross-promotion or route packaging potential.

opportunity_cards.title: Strong onward link to Hong Kong Disneyland
opportunity_cards.detail: Visitors often continue from Ocean Park to Hong Kong Disneyland, with relatively strong journey experience.

opportunity_cards.title: High visibility, weaker experience
opportunity_cards.detail: Ocean Park draws meaningful traffic but performs below its category average on experience.

opportunity_cards.title: Concentrated source market
opportunity_cards.detail: Demand appears relatively concentrated in a single source market, suggesting some dependency risk.
